# flashduty_member (Data Source)

Use this data source to get information about a Flashduty member.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get member by ID
data "flashduty_member" "john" {
  member_id = 75340551232454
}

# Use the member data
output "member_email" {
  value = data.flashduty_member.john.email
}

output "member_name" {
  value = data.flashduty_member.john.member_name
}

output "member_verified" {
  value = data.flashduty_member.john.email_verified
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `member_id` (Number) The ID of the member.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) The creation timestamp.
- `email` (String) The email address of the member.
- `email_verified` (Boolean) Whether the email is verified.
- `member_name` (String) The name of the member.
- `phone` (String) The phone number of the member (encrypted).
- `phone_verified` (Boolean) Whether the phone is verified.
- `status` (String) The status of the member.
- `updated_at` (Number) The last update timestamp.
